title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 39
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear two friends talking about a visit to a village show.
questions.audio_script: Boy: What did you do at the village show last weekend? I thought you wanted to try dog competition. || Girl: I did, but it started too early. || Boy: Did you do jazz band instead? || Girl: No, because it was too loud. In the end, [1]I spent most of the afternoon doing craft table[/1]. It was better than I expected. || Boy: I might come next time. || Girl: You should. The helpers were friendly, and everything was easy to understand. || Girl: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

dialogue.speaker: girl

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I might come next time.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: You should. The helpers were friendly, and everything was easy to understand.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

questions.context: You hear two students talking about what to take on a camping night.
questions.audio_script: Girl: Are you ready for the camping night tomorrow? I was going to pack a swimming things, because that seemed useful. || Boy: I read the message from school again. You do not need that. || Girl: What about a torch? || Boy: Not really. [1]The teacher says everyone should bring a musical instrument because the path to the toilets is dark[/1]. || Girl: Thanks. I will put it in my bag now, before I forget. || Boy: Good plan. We have to leave early in the morning. || Boy: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about travelling to the swimming pool.
questions.audio_script: Woman: How are you getting to the swimming pool tomorrow? I thought you were going to walk. || Girl: I was, but I have too much to carry. || Woman: Could you use the bike instead? || Girl: I checked, but the tyre needs air. [1]I am going to take the car because Mum can drop me there before work[/1]. || Woman: That sounds sensible. I will meet you near the entrance when you arrive. || Girl: Great. I will send a message if I am late. || Girl: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

questions.context: You hear two people choosing food at a airport café.
questions.audio_script: Man: Have you chosen what to eat at the airport café? The queue is moving quickly now. || Woman: I nearly chose the salad box, and I also looked at the muffin. || Man: They both look fine to me. || Woman: Maybe, but the salad is hard to eat on the plane and muffins are too sweet. [1]I am going to have the chicken roll[/1]. It should be enough before we leave. || Man: Good choice. I will order mine after you, and then we can sit near the window.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a lost football boots.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Did you find your football boots? You looked everywhere this morning. || Man: Not at first. I went back to the team bus, because I remembered coming back from the match there. || Woman: What about the garage? You were there later. || Man: I checked, but it was not there. Then my brother called and said [1]my boots was behind the kitchen door[/1]. I must have left it there before school. || Woman: That is lucky. You need it today, don't you? || Man: Yes, I'll collect it before lunch.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about buying thing for the garden.
questions.audio_script: Boy: I need to buy thing for the garden, but I cannot decide. I first thought about a chair. || Girl: That might be nice. What about a bird feeder? || Boy: I looked at one, but it was too expensive. In the end, [1]I chose a watering can because Dad planted new flowers yesterday[/1]. || Girl: That sounds useful, and it is better than buying something just because it looks pretty. || Boy: I agree. I will wrap it when I get home tonight. || Boy: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a part-time job at a clothes shop.
questions.audio_script: Man: What job are you doing at the clothes shop this afternoon? I thought you had to fold jumpers. || Boy: I did last week, but someone finished that already. || Man: Are you going to stand by the changing rooms then? || Boy: No, because they are closed today. The manager just told me that [1]I need to price new coats[/1]. || Man: That sounds easier than the other jobs. || Boy: Maybe, but I still have to finish before five, because the place gets busy then. || Boy: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.
